name: Coconut Drops
recipeInstructions:
Recipe by: Jo Anne Merrill
Preparation Time: 0:25
1. Sift flour, baking powder, baking soda, and salt into a large bowl.
Add the oats and coconut; set aside.
2. Cream shortening with both sugars until light and fluffy using an electric mixer on medium speed. Beat in vanilla and egg until well mixed. Gradually add the flour mixture to form a stiff dough.
3. Drop by teaspoonfuls, 1 inch apart, onto lightly greased cookie sheets. Bake at preheated 375°F for 10 minutes or until golden brown.
4. Cool on cookie sheet for 5 minutes, then remove to wire rack to cool completely.
Yield: about 5 dozen.
